articles.title: Korea’s AI chip market is now the opening bell for global stocks

articles.content:
TL;DR
Koreas market now sets global AI sentiment. The Kospi-Nasdaq correlation has nearly tripled. SK Hynixs US listing extended Koreas influence into 24-hour trading.
